Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Output STRO dominates today's ranking with a composite score of 94.7 (rank 1), displaying exceptional consistency across all momentum metrics—it passes 4 of 5 ratio gates, trades above all major moving averages, and shows extraordinary long-term gains of 318.51% over one year while maintaining a 1-month return of 47.01%. SGML ranks second with similarly strong fundamentals (all SMAs passed, 4 ratio passes) but shows a notable inconsistency: its 3-month return of 73.64% actually underperforms its 1-month return of 78.85%, suggesting recent deceleration that may warrant caution despite the 296.23% six-month gain. Both tickers significantly outpace SPY and QQQ across most timeframes, with STRO demonstrating superior resilience on down-market days (bad_spy_score of 1.38 vs SGML's 1.90), indicating it sold off less severely during broad market weakness. The data reveals a market segment favoring persistent uptrends with clean technical structures, though SGML's ratio compression between the 1-month and 3-month periods introduces a potential warning flag that traders should monitor for continuation or reversal signals.
